detail.short_info: The officials of CGBSE have released the CGBSE Time Table 2025 for Class 10th and 12th Programmes. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

sections.heading: CGBSE Time Table 2025 - Download Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education Exam Date Sheet PDF

content.text: Quick Summary: CGBSE Time Table 2025 has been released at cgbse.nic.in. Students can download the Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education exam schedule for Class 10th and 12th and other courses. Check exam dates, download steps, and important updates below.
Last Updated: December 04, 2025

sections.heading: CGBSE Time Table 2025 Highlights
Download CGBSE Time Table 2025 - Direct Links
Latest Updates on CGBSE Time Table 2025

items: CGBSE Time Table 2025 released on November 30, 2025
Time table available for Class 10th and 12th and all UG/PG courses
Both regular and supplementary exam schedules published
Downloadable in PDF format from cgbse.nic.in
Students must check reporting time and exam center details

sections.heading: What is CGBSE Time Table 2025?

content.text: The CGBSE Time Table 2025 is the official examination schedule released by Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education for the academic year 2024-25. This document contains crucial information including:

items: Exact exam dates for each subject/paper
Exam timing and duration
Course-wise and semester-wise schedule
Regular and supplementary exam dates
Important instructions for students

content.text: Students appearing for Class 10th and 12th examinations must download the Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education time table to prepare their study schedule effectively.

sections.heading: How to Download CGBSE Time Table 2025? (Step-by-Step)

content.text: Follow these simple steps to download your CGBSE exam date sheet 2025:

sections.heading: Method 1: Direct Download from Official Website

items: Visit Official Website: Go to cgbse.nic.in
Navigate to Examination Section: Look for "Examinations" or "Students" section on homepage
Click on Time Table/Date Sheet: Find "Examination Schedule" or "Time Table" link
Select Academic Year: Choose 2024-25 or current session
Choose Your Course: Select Class 10th and 12th or your specific course
Select Exam Type: Regular/Supplementary/Backlog
Download PDF: Click on the download button to save the time table
Save and Print: Save the PDF and take a printout for reference

sections.heading: Method 2: Quick Access (Use Links Above)

content.text: Use the direct download links provided in the table above to instantly access your CGBSE Time Table 2025 PDF without navigating through the website.

sections.heading: CGBSE Time Table 2025 - Course Wise Details
Important Information About CGBSE Examinations 2025
Before the Exam - Checklist

items: Download and verify your CGBSE Time Table 2025
Check your exam center and reporting time
Download admit card from cgbse.nic.in
Prepare valid photo ID proof
Review exam pattern and marking scheme
Note down important exam guidelines

sections.heading: Documents Required for Exam

items: Admit Card (mandatory)
Valid Photo ID (Aadhar/PAN/Driving License)
College ID Card
Blue/black pen (multiple)

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions - CGBSE Time Table 2025

content.text: When will CGBSE Time Table 2025 be released?
The Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education typically releases the time table 3-4 weeks before the examination. Students should regularly check cgbse.nic.in for the latest updates.
Where can I download CGBSE Time Table 2025?
You can download the CGBSE Time Table 2025 from the official website cgbse.nic.in or use the direct download links provided on this page.
Is CGBSE Time Table 2025 available for all courses?
Yes, the time table is available for all undergraduate and postgraduate courses including Class 10th and 12th, along with regular and supplementary examinations.
What should I do if there's an error in my CGBSE Time Table 2025?
If you notice any discrepancy in your exam schedule, immediately contact the examination cell of Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education through their official website or visit the campus office.
Can the CGBSE exam dates be changed after time table release?
In rare circumstances, exam dates may be revised due to unavoidable reasons. Students should regularly check the official website for any updates or amendments.
How to prepare for exams according to CGBSE Time Table 2025?
Create a study plan based on the time table, prioritize difficult subjects, allocate specific time for revision, and attempt previous year papers before each exam.
